3286030.name: Boardguard
3286030.description:
Boardguard is a turn-based strategy roguelike where you control a pawn on a chess-like board fighting off waves of enchanted enemies. Be strategic with your positioning and attacks to ensure you don't get surrounded, and utilize your available currency wisely to make sure you can endure the onslaught.

  • Play using a number of unique playstyles, fully customizable using the in-game shop. Purchase powerful relics that will amplify your strength or ward off enemy attacks.

  • Fight a variety of enchanted foes that each have unique movement, and strategize to avoid their attacks.

  • Discover new strategies and 15+ items throughout multiple runs

  • Adapt to the randomly generated levels, and make sure you are aware of the battle you find yourself in.
